Serving Tollygunge

Dentist Near Tollygunge | Expert Dental Care at Salt Lake

Looking for a trusted dentist near Tollygunge? Sushmita's Dental Clinic at CG-243, Sector-2, Salt Lake City (Bidhannagar) is one of the most accessible and highly regarded dental clinics for patients from Tollygunge and the surrounding South Kolkata area.

Patients from Tollygunge can reach our Salt Lake Sector II clinic easily in approximately 35-45 mins via EM Bypass. Our clinic is located near Corporation Bank, with excellent transport links including Kolkata Metro (Tollygunge Metro (Blue Line)) and multiple bus routes serving the Salt Lake area.

Whether you need a routine dental checkup, emergency treatment, cosmetic work, or specialist care like implants or orthodontics, our experienced team is ready to provide the best dental care for you and your family.

Distance from Tollygunge35-45 mins via EM Bypass approx.
Nearest MetroTollygunge Metro (Blue Line)
Nearby LandmarkNear Tollygunge Club, Film Studios
Clinic HoursMon–Sat: 9 AM – 9 PM
Emergency DentalSame Day Appointments Available
